---
title: "Jiuru Lyu"
subtitle: "吕九如"
image: media/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17ems
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiuru-lyu/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JrLyu
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jiuru.lyu@emory.edu
listing:
  - id: news
    contents:
      - news
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    max-items: 4
---

Hi! My name is Jiuru Lyu, and I am a senior at Emory University studying Applied Mathematics. In my leisure time, I enjoy coffee brewing, traveling, photography, and commercial aviation.

---

# News!

::: {#news}
:::

---

## Education
**Emory University** (2022 - 2026) | Atlanta, GA <br>
BS in Applied Mathematics and Statistics; Minor in Computer Science

**United World College Changshu China** (2019 - 2022) | Suzhou, China <br>
International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme
